interpretation.why_not_complete: The smoke subset verifies final-report command hygiene and a few lightweight audits only. It does not execute IsaacLab/Kit rollouts, ROS 2 launches, long VAE/diffusion training, TensorRT export, Fig. 5/Fig. 6 reproduction, or real Unitree G1 deployment.

scope: Audit final-report verification commands and execute a bounded lightweight smoke subset.
